# MouseBall54 Toolbox

MouseBall54 Toolbox is a bilingual developer and practical knowledge site focused on troubleshooting, AI workflows, study systems, personal finance education, and image labeling workflows.

Primary site: https://mouseball54.github.io/
RSS feed: https://mouseball54.github.io/feed.xml
Sitemap: https://mouseball54.github.io/sitemap.xml
Image sitemap: https://mouseball54.github.io/image-sitemap.xml

## Core Hubs

- Korean Troubleshooting: https://mouseball54.github.io/ko_Troubleshooting/
- English Troubleshooting: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_Troubleshooting/
- Korean AI Trends: https://mouseball54.github.io/ko_AI_Trends/
- English AI Trends: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_AI_Trends/
- Korean Study: https://mouseball54.github.io/ko_Study/
- English Study: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_Study/
- Korean Economy: https://mouseball54.github.io/ko_Economy/
- English Economy: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_Economy/
- Korean Easy Labeling: https://mouseball54.github.io/ko_easy_labeling/
- English Easy Labeling: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_easy_labeling/

## Representative Articles

- AI Agent Workflow 2026: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_AI_Trends/ai-agent-workflow-2026/
- Prompt Engineering Checklist: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_AI_Trends/prompt-engineering-checklist/
- RAG Evaluation Checklist: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_AI_Trends/rag-evaluation-checklist/
- Active Recall Study Method: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_Study/active-recall-study-method/
- Spaced Repetition Schedule: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_Study/spaced-repetition-schedule/
- Compound Interest Example: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_Economy/compound-interest-example/
- Emergency Fund Guide: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_Economy/emergency-fund-how-much/
- Local Image Labeling Workflow: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_easy_labeling/local-image-labeling-workflow/
- YOLO Label Format: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_easy_labeling/yolo-label-format/
- GitHub Actions Build Failed: https://mouseball54.github.io/en_Troubleshooting/github-actions-build-failed/

## Content Notes

- Economy content is educational and is not personal financial advice.
- Troubleshooting content is written around reproducible symptoms, causes, fixes, and verification steps.
- Easy Labeling content supports image annotation, YOLO datasets, COCO conversion, and dataset quality workflows.
- AI Trends content prioritizes verification, workflow design, structured outputs, and practical automation boundaries.
